name: lrx-monorepo
description: Averrow Platform Monorepo — AI-first threat intelligence & brand protection

overridesNotes._: Rationale for each pnpm.overrides entry (D3 dep-hygiene). pnpm forbids comment keys inside overrides, so notes live here. Drop a pin once the upstream dep resolves the fix within our semver range.
overridesNotes.protocol-buffers-schema: moderate (prototype pollution, <3.6.1). Browser-shipped in the averrow-ops SPA bundle via deck.gl>@deck.gl/carto>pbf>resolve-protobuf-schema. No non-major direct-dep bump exposes the fix, so pin the transitive to the patched patch release.
overridesNotes.flatted: high (DoS, <3.4.2). Dev-only, buried under trust-radar>eslint>file-entry-cache>flat-cache>flatted — pinned by flat-cache with no direct-dep bump that reaches it. Pin the transitive to the patched patch release (3.4.2, the current latest).
overridesNotes.ws: high (DoS, <8.21.0). Dev/test-only, pulled by averrow-ops>jsdom (the vitest test env). jsdom's dep range is ^8.18.0 so a jsdom major bump wouldn't change the resolution; pnpm dedup keeps 8.18.0. Pin to the patched 8.x release — patch-level within jsdom's existing ws major, no behavior change.
overridesNotes.form-data: high (unsafe boundary randomness, <4.0.6). Dev/test-only, pulled by averrow-ops>jsdom. jsdom's dep range is ^4.0.0; pnpm resolved 4.0.5. Pin to the patched 4.x release — patch-level within jsdom's existing form-data major.
